summary.en: Humanly helps hiring teams build engaged, high-performing organizations through technology that scales human connection.
summary.zh: Humanly 透過能規模化人際連結的技術，協助招募團隊打造高參與度、高績效的組織。

highlight.en: It targets broken high-volume hiring by centering the process on quality candidate conversations instead of resumes and cover letters, aiming to reduce bias.
highlight.zh: 它瞄準失靈的大量招募流程，將重心放在與候選人的高品質對話而非履歷與求職信上，力求減少偏見。

summary.en: Vori is a modern operating system for supermarkets.
summary.zh: Vori 是專為超市打造的現代化作業系統。

highlight.en: VoriOS streamlines inventory, ordering, and supplier coordination for independent and regional grocers, using real-time data to level the field against big retailers.
highlight.zh: VoriOS 為獨立及區域型雜貨商簡化庫存、訂貨與供應商協調，運用即時資料協助他們與大型零售商抗衡。

summary.en: StayQrious helps kids in India learn school subjects through online group classes led by coaches.
summary.zh: StayQrious 透過由教練帶領的線上小組課程，協助印度孩童學習學科。

highlight.en: Like personalized fitness workouts but for school subjects, students follow daily learning workouts with constant coach feedback and only advance after mastering prerequisites.
highlight.zh: 如同個人化健身訓練但用於學科，學生依每日的學習課表進行，獲得教練持續回饋，並在掌握先備知識後才會進階。

summary.en: Handl converts documents like invoices and forms into structured data through a simple API.
summary.zh: Handl 透過簡易 API，將發票、表單等文件轉換為結構化資料。

highlight.en: It aims for fully automated extraction with no manual supervision by combining ML/AI with humans-in-the-loop to handle even the most complicated cases in real time.
highlight.zh: 它結合 ML/AI 與人工協作（humans-in-the-loop），即時處理最複雜的案例，目標是無需人工監督的全自動化擷取。

summary.en: Loop Health offers modern, comprehensive health insurance plans for employees in India.
summary.zh: Loop Health 為印度的企業員工提供現代化、全面的健康保險方案。

highlight.en: It combines unlimited primary care at asset-light clinics with traditional hospitalization insurance, addressing that Indian insurance covers hospital stays but not doctor visits.
highlight.zh: 它在輕資產診所提供無限次基層醫療，並結合傳統住院保險，解決印度保險只給付住院、不給付門診的問題。

summary.en: HireSweet is talent acquisition software built for data-driven recruiting teams.
summary.zh: HireSweet 是專為資料驅動招募團隊打造的人才招募軟體。

highlight.en: The platform equips recruiting teams with a data-driven approach to sourcing and managing talent acquisition.
highlight.zh: 該平台以資料驅動的方式，協助招募團隊進行人才搜尋與招募管理。

summary.en: Raycast speeds up non-coding tasks for engineering teams.
summary.zh: Raycast 加速工程團隊處理非寫程式的工作。

highlight.en: It is a productivity tool that saves time on non-coding work in apps like Jira, GitHub, and Slack, which can consume up to 50% of a developer's day.
highlight.zh: 它是一款生產力工具，可在 Jira、GitHub、Slack 等應用中節省非寫程式工作的時間，這類工作可能佔開發者一天的 50%。

summary.en: Release delivers staging environments as a service.
summary.zh: Release 以服務形式提供測試（staging）環境。

highlight.en: It automatically generates a staging environment with every pull request, removing the bottleneck companies face when sharing a single staging environment.
highlight.zh: 它在每個 pull request 時自動產生一個測試環境，消除公司只有單一測試環境時的瓶頸。

summary.en: delt.ai provides digital banking for businesses in Latin America.
summary.zh: delt.ai 為拉丁美洲的企業提供數位銀行服務。

highlight.en: Built natively digital with payment gateways and API integrations, its KYC-compliant onboarding let it open Mexico's first branchless business accounts, targeting underserved startups and SMEs.
highlight.zh: 它以原生數位方式打造，內建支付閘道與 API 整合，符合 KYC 的開戶流程讓它成為墨西哥首家開設無分行企業帳戶者，鎖定服務不足的新創與中小企業。

summary.en: Perceptive Technologies automates tooth cutting for dentists using imaging, AI, and robotics.
summary.zh: Perceptive Technologies 運用影像、AI 與機器人技術，為牙醫自動化牙齒切削。

highlight.en: Its X-ray-free imaging sees inside teeth and below the gumline, with AI diagnosing decay and robotics cutting surgery time to about one minute in the $452B dental industry.
highlight.zh: 其無需 X 光的影像技術可看見牙齒內部與牙齦下方，由 AI 診斷蛀牙、機器人將手術時間縮短至約一分鐘，切入 4,520 億美元的牙科產業。

summary.en: Bikry helps small and medium businesses in India go online.
summary.zh: Bikry 協助印度的中小企業上線經營。

highlight.en: Its no-code platform builds stores an online catalogue with digital payments and pan-India delivery logistics in five minutes, shared via WhatsApp and social media to drive orders.
highlight.zh: 其無程式碼平台可在五分鐘內為商家建立含數位支付與全印度配送物流的線上型錄，並透過 WhatsApp 與社群媒體分享以帶動訂單。

summary.en: Explo is an embedded analytics and data-sharing platform.
summary.zh: Explo 是一個嵌入式分析與資料分享平台。

highlight.en: It lets product teams build white-labeled customer-facing dashboards, embed a self-service report builder, and add an AI experience for users to gain data insights.
highlight.zh: 它讓產品團隊建立白標的對客儀表板、嵌入自助式報表產生器，並加入 AI 體驗讓使用者從資料中獲得洞察。

summary.en: EduRev is a learning app for India's students, likened to a Netflix for education.
summary.zh: EduRev 是面向印度學生的學習應用程式，被比喻為教育界的 Netflix。

highlight.en: Combining education with social networking, it aims to make learning so good that students no longer need schools or coaching, and has won app awards from Google and the Gates Foundation.
highlight.zh: 它結合教育與社群網路，目標是讓學習好到學生不再需要學校或補習，並曾獲 Google 與蓋茲基金會的應用程式獎項。

summary.en: Nomic is doing for protein profiling what Illumina did for DNA sequencing.
summary.zh: Nomic 在蛋白質分析上所做的，正如 Illumina 之於 DNA 定序。

highlight.en: Its nELISA platform profiles hundreds of proteins at 10x higher throughput and 10x lower cost than existing solutions, aimed first at high-throughput drug discovery scientists.
highlight.zh: 其 nELISA 平台能以較現有方案高 10 倍的通量、低 10 倍的成本分析數百種蛋白質，首先鎖定高通量藥物探索的研究人員。

summary.en: Nextmv is a DecisionOps platform that accelerates optimization AI teams.
summary.zh: Nextmv 是一個 DecisionOps 平台，協助加速優化 AI 團隊的工作。

highlight.en: It gives developers tools for deployment, testing, CI/CD, and management of decision models, with API endpoints and integrations to popular solvers and modeling solutions.
highlight.zh: 它為開發者提供決策模型的部署、測試、CI/CD 與管理工具，並具備 API 端點及與主流求解器與建模方案的整合。

summary.en: Hiration helps job seekers quickly create resumes that get more interviews.
summary.zh: Hiration 協助求職者快速製作能爭取更多面試機會的履歷。

highlight.en: Its SaaS spans resumes, cover letters, LinkedIn, and interview prep, adding 100k+ active job seekers monthly and planning a recruitment marketplace to close the loop.
highlight.zh: 其 SaaS 涵蓋履歷、求職信、LinkedIn 與面試準備，每月新增逾 10 萬名活躍求職者，並計畫推出招募媒合平台以串接整個流程。

summary.en: Viya offers mobile-first apartment rentals for Latin America.
summary.zh: Viya 為拉丁美洲提供行動優先的公寓租賃服務。

highlight.en: It pairs room and apartment leases in city centers with bundled services like cleaning, maintenance, and laundry to make affordable urban living less hectic for tenants.
highlight.zh: 它將市中心的房間與公寓租約搭配清潔、維修、洗衣等整合服務，讓房客負擔得起的城市生活更省心。

summary.en: Hent helps land lot developers better manage their sales operations.
summary.zh: Hent 協助土地建案開發商更妥善管理銷售業務。

highlight.en: It improves how developers manage sales receivables and streamline processes by securing access to capital and connecting all the stakeholders involved.
highlight.zh: 它透過確保資金取得並串連所有相關利害關係人，協助開發商管理銷售應收款並簡化流程。

summary.en: Tough Commerce is a Shopify for the construction industry.
summary.zh: Tough Commerce 是營建產業的 Shopify。

highlight.en: Its white-label commerce platform digitizes industry workflows with order, pricing, dispatching, e-ticketing, invoicing, and payments, plus a driver app for real-time delivery.
highlight.zh: 其白標商務平台將產業流程數位化，涵蓋訂單、定價、派工、電子單據、開立發票與支付，並提供司機 App 支援即時配送。

summary.en: Linkana is the leading supplier relationship management (SRM) platform for Latin America.
summary.zh: Linkana 是拉丁美洲領先的供應商關係管理（SRM）平台。

highlight.en: It helps enterprise companies cut the lead time and cost of supplier onboarding approvals through an easy-to-use, integrated SRM platform.
highlight.zh: 它透過易於使用且整合的 SRM 平台，協助大型企業縮短供應商導入核准的前置時間並降低成本。

summary.en: Accord is an AI-powered revenue excellence platform for sales teams.
summary.zh: Accord 是面向銷售團隊的 AI 營收卓越平台。

highlight.en: It turns what top sellers do naturally—multi-threading, mutual action plans, business cases—into repeatable playbooks, and automates research and stakeholder mapping.
highlight.zh: 它將頂尖業務的自然做法——多線聯繫、共同行動計畫、商業提案——轉化為可複製的劇本，並自動化客戶研究與利害關係人盤點。

summary.en: RoboTire is automating vehicle maintenance, starting with tire changing.
summary.zh: RoboTire 正在自動化車輛維修，從更換輪胎著手。

highlight.en: It builds fully integrated robotic containers that change tires in 10 minutes and can drop into existing shops, parking lots, or remote fleet service areas.
highlight.zh: 它打造全整合的機器人貨櫃，可在 10 分鐘內更換輪胎，並能放置於現有店面、停車場或偏遠的車隊維修據點。

summary.en: Factored Quality brings brands' quality and compliance operations into one unified platform.
summary.zh: Factored Quality 將品牌的品質與合規作業整合至單一統一平台。

highlight.en: Its digital QC management tool helps 100+ brands like Brooklinen, The Honest Company, and Dr. Squatch run QC, supplier audits, and compliance testing anywhere in the world.
highlight.zh: 其數位品管工具協助 Brooklinen、The Honest Company、Dr. Squatch 等逾 100 個品牌，在全球任何地點進行品管、供應商稽核與合規測試。

summary.en: Handoff is an AI estimator and agent for remodelers.
summary.zh: Handoff 是面向裝修業者的 AI 估價與代理工具。

highlight.en: Using generative AI and localized construction costs, it creates instant, accurate remodeling estimates in minutes and automates contractors' business operations.
highlight.zh: 它運用生成式 AI 與在地化的營建成本資料，幾分鐘內產出即時、準確的裝修估價，並自動化承包商的營運作業。

summary.en: Medicare Vox is building an AI health insurance agent.
summary.zh: Medicare Vox 正在打造一個 AI 健康保險代理人。

highlight.en: Formerly Fair Square, the company is developing an AI agent focused on the health insurance space.
highlight.zh: 該公司前身為 Fair Square，正在開發一個聚焦健康保險領域的 AI 代理人。

summary.en: Swipe builds modern payments, accounting, and cashflow management tools for businesses.
summary.zh: Swipe 為企業打造現代化的支付、會計與現金流管理工具。

highlight.en: It owns and operates Float, a global B2B payments platform, and Accounteer, a cloud accounting and bookkeeping platform for businesses and freelancers.
highlight.zh: 它擁有並營運全球 B2B 支付平台 Float，以及面向企業與自由工作者的雲端會計與記帳平台 Accounteer。

summary.en: Valienta helps dropshippers in Colombia run their business and increase sales.
summary.zh: Valienta 協助哥倫比亞的代發貨（dropshipping）業者經營業務並提升銷售。

highlight.en: It gives users a marketplace of 160+ suppliers, free e-commerce sites, nationwide shipping, multiple payment methods, and a credit line, aiming to be the dropshipping OS for LatAm.
highlight.zh: 它為使用者提供逾 160 家供應商的市集、免費電商網站、全國配送、多元支付方式與信用額度，目標成為拉丁美洲的代發貨作業系統。

summary.en: PowerX makes AI-powered sensors that save energy, water, and emissions.
summary.zh: PowerX 製造以 AI 驅動的感測器，協助節省能源、用水並減少排放。

highlight.en: Its sensors generate proprietary data that helps corporations save 30% or more in energy, water, and emissions.
highlight.zh: 其感測器產生專有資料，協助企業在能源、用水與排放上節省 30% 以上。

summary.en: Junction is an API for at-home health data.
summary.zh: Junction 是一個提供居家健康資料的 API。

highlight.en: It lets health tech companies collect data from hundreds of wearable devices and deliver at-home test kits, combining wearable and lab data through a single line of code.
highlight.zh: 它讓健康科技公司透過單行程式碼，從數百種穿戴裝置蒐集資料並寄送居家檢測套組，整合穿戴與檢驗資料。

summary.en: Talyn Air builds long-range, battery-electric vertical take-off and landing aircraft.
summary.zh: Talyn Air 打造長航程、電池電動的垂直起降飛行器。

highlight.en: Its cargo eVTOL achieves fixed-wing performance with VTOL capability by having an electric fixed-wing aircraft caught mid-air by a custom winged drone.
highlight.zh: 其貨運 eVTOL 透過電動定翼飛機在空中被一架客製化的有翼無人機接住，兼顧定翼性能與垂直起降能力。

summary.en: Jenfi provides revenue-based financing for digital businesses in Asia.
summary.zh: Jenfi 為亞洲的數位企業提供以營收為基礎的融資。

highlight.en: It funds repeatable, revenue-generating business spend with flexible repayment tied to sales, addressing that 50-70% of bankable Asian businesses can't access growth capital.
highlight.zh: 它為可帶來營收、重複性的企業支出提供資金，採與銷售掛鉤的彈性還款，解決亞洲 50-70% 具還款能力企業卻拿不到成長資金的問題。

summary.en: Datree prevents Kubernetes misconfigurations from reaching production.
summary.zh: Datree 防止 Kubernetes 的錯誤設定流入正式環境。

highlight.en: Its open-source CLI runs automated policy checks in the pipeline, revealing misconfigurations in seconds so teams can enforce standards from development to production.
highlight.zh: 其開源 CLI 工具在管線中執行自動化政策檢查，數秒內揭露錯誤設定，讓團隊從開發到正式環境皆能落實標準。

summary.en: Prelay is a team selling platform for revenue teams.
summary.zh: Prelay 是面向營收團隊的團隊銷售平台。

highlight.en: It centralizes deal coordination and communication in one platform integrated with key software, giving sales and presales leaders insight into how resources are used.
highlight.zh: 它將交易協調與溝通集中於單一平台並整合關鍵軟體，讓銷售與售前主管掌握資源運用情形。

summary.en: Flik is an AI-focused company building products for businesses.
summary.zh: Flik 是一家以 AI 為核心、為企業打造產品的公司。

highlight.en: A YC Winter 2020 B2B startup operating at flikai.com, focused on AI-driven business tools.
highlight.zh: 一家 YC 2020 冬季的 B2B 新創，營運網站為 flikai.com，專注於 AI 驅動的企業工具。

summary.en: Eternal lets people own the best moments in streaming.
summary.zh: Eternal 讓人們擁有串流中的最精彩時刻。

highlight.en: A YC Winter 2020 consumer startup centered on capturing and owning standout streaming moments.
highlight.zh: 一家 YC 2020 冬季的消費端新創，核心在於擷取並擁有串流中的精彩時刻。

summary.en: Haven is reimagining homeownership for the 21st century.
summary.zh: Haven 為 21 世紀重新構想房屋持有體驗。

highlight.en: Targeting the $11 trillion U.S. mortgage industry and 53 million mortgage holders, it aims to replace decades-old lender technology with modern digital experiences.
highlight.zh: 它瞄準 11 兆美元的美國房貸產業與 5,300 萬名房貸持有者，致力以現代化數位體驗取代房貸業者數十年的老舊技術。

summary.en: General Proximity develops the next generation of induced-proximity medicines.
summary.zh: General Proximity 開發新一代的誘導鄰近（induced-proximity）藥物。

highlight.en: A YC Winter 2020 healthcare startup advancing induced-proximity therapeutics, a modality that brings molecules together to drive disease-modifying effects.
highlight.zh: 一家 YC 2020 冬季的醫療新創，推進誘導鄰近療法——一種使分子相互靠近以產生疾病調節效果的藥物機制。

summary.en: BuildBuddy provides enterprise features for Bazel, the open-source build system.
summary.zh: BuildBuddy 為開源建置系統 Bazel 提供企業級功能。

highlight.en: It extends the open-source Bazel build tool with enterprise-grade capabilities for engineering teams.
highlight.zh: 它在開源的 Bazel 建置工具之上，為工程團隊擴充企業級的功能。

summary.en: Zeo Route Planner is a route optimization platform for SMBs in delivery and home services.
summary.zh: Zeo Route Planner 是面向配送與居家服務中小企業的路線優化平台。

highlight.en: Trusted by over 1 million drivers across 146 countries, it offers no-code stop assignment, route optimization, real-time tracking, and proof of delivery in under 15 minutes setup.
highlight.zh: 它獲 146 國逾 100 萬名司機使用，提供無程式碼的站點分派、路線優化、即時追蹤與配送證明，設定不到 15 分鐘即可完成。

summary.en: Breathe Well-being is a digital program helping people prevent or manage chronic lifestyle diseases.
summary.zh: Breathe Well-being 是一個數位計畫，協助人們預防或管理慢性生活型疾病。

highlight.en: Pitched as a Noom for India, it delivers weight loss via remote 1-1 coaching, CBT techniques, and a gamified app, claiming 3x effectiveness at a quarter of the cost.
highlight.zh: 它被定位為印度版 Noom，透過遠端一對一指導、認知行為治療技巧與遊戲化 App 提供減重服務，宣稱效果為三倍而成本僅四分之一。

summary.en: Healthlane is building Africa's preventative health system.
summary.zh: Healthlane 正在打造非洲的預防性健康體系。

highlight.en: It is rebuilding Africa's health system with a focus on prevention rather than reactive treatment.
highlight.zh: 它以預防而非被動治療為重點，重新打造非洲的健康體系。

summary.en: Gas Pos is a modern point-of-sale system for gas stations and truck stops.
summary.zh: Gas Pos 是面向加油站與卡車休息站的現代化銷售點（POS）系統。

highlight.en: It disrupts a monopolized, overpriced, asset-heavy industry with a better, affordable, more functional SaaS alternative.
highlight.zh: 它以更優質、實惠且功能更豐富的 SaaS 方案，顛覆一個被壟斷、價格過高且資產沉重的產業。

summary.en: Algen Biotechnologies uses CRISPR to find treatments for cancer and inflammation.
summary.zh: Algen Biotechnologies 運用 CRISPR 尋找癌症與發炎疾病的治療方法。

highlight.en: It pairs CRISPR with machine learning to uncover disease-driving RNA messages and find first-in-class drugs at single-cell resolution, co-founded by a Jennifer Doudna Lab bioengineer.
highlight.zh: 它結合 CRISPR 與機器學習，以單細胞解析度找出驅動疾病的 RNA 訊息並開發同類首創藥物，由 Jennifer Doudna 實驗室的生物工程師共同創辦。

summary.en: DocVita is a telehealth provider for India.
summary.zh: DocVita 是面向印度的遠距醫療服務商。

highlight.en: It enables care over Zoom, Meet, or WhatsApp in 11 local languages, with a concierge handling logistics for patients and back-office work for doctors.
highlight.zh: 它透過 Zoom、Meet 或 WhatsApp 以 11 種當地語言提供醫療服務，並有專人為病患處理流程、為醫師處理後台工作。

summary.en: Abalone Bio creates activating antibodies to treat diseases others can't.
summary.zh: Abalone Bio 開發活化型抗體，以治療他人難以攻克的疾病。

highlight.en: Its engineered cells measure 100 million antibodies at a time for pharmacological activity, using ML to find rare hits for undrugged targets, starting with GPCRs for obesity.
highlight.zh: 其改造細胞可一次測量一億個抗體的藥理活性，運用 ML 為無藥可用的標靶找出罕見命中藥物，並從治療肥胖的 GPCR 著手。

summary.en: Ditto helps teams manage the words across their product from design to production.
summary.zh: Ditto 協助團隊從設計到上線管理產品中的所有文案。

highlight.en: It provides a single source of truth for product copy, keeping text consistent across the workflow from design tools through to production code.
highlight.zh: 它為產品文案提供單一可信來源，讓文字從設計工具到正式程式碼的整個流程中保持一致。

summary.en: Exosonic develops supersonic UAVs as a pathway to quiet supersonic flight.
summary.zh: Exosonic 開發超音速無人機，作為通往安靜超音速飛行的途徑。

highlight.en: It builds supersonic adversary-air training UAVs, aiming to mature them into loyal wingmen and eventually quiet supersonic airliners, having raised $4.5M+ private and $2M+ AFWERX funding.
highlight.zh: 它打造用於假想敵空戰訓練的超音速無人機，目標是發展為忠誠僚機並最終做出安靜的超音速客機，已募得逾 450 萬美元私人資金與逾 200 萬美元 AFWERX 資金。

summary.en: Homestead is a real estate development platform for homeowners.
summary.zh: Homestead 是面向房屋持有者的房地產開發平台。

highlight.en: It lets homeowners become their own developer under California's SB9 law, splitting their lots in half, building a new unit, and selling it on the open market.
highlight.zh: 它讓房屋持有者依加州 SB9 法案成為自己的開發商，將地塊一分為二、興建新單位並於公開市場出售。

summary.en: Bamboo is the first online brokerage service for Africans to invest in global securities.
summary.zh: Bamboo 是首個讓非洲人投資全球證券的線上券商服務。

highlight.en: Aiming to be Fidelity for Africa, its mobile app lets individuals trade US markets directly, addressing that 99.99% of Nigeria's investing population can't access global investing.
highlight.zh: 它志在成為非洲的 Fidelity，其行動 App 讓個人直接交易美國市場，解決奈及利亞 99.99% 投資人口無法投資全球市場的問題。

summary.en: Tambua Health offers a bloodless blood diagnostic app.
summary.zh: Tambua Health 提供一款無需採血的血液診斷應用程式。

highlight.en: Its NoDraw app turns any smartphone into a full blood panel diagnostic tool, billed as the world's first bloodless blood diagnostic app.
highlight.zh: 其 NoDraw App 可將任何智慧型手機變成完整的血液檢測診斷工具，號稱是全球首款無需採血的血液診斷應用程式。

summary.en: Farcast builds advanced satellite communication user terminals.
summary.zh: Farcast 打造先進的衛星通訊使用者終端設備。

highlight.en: A YC Winter 2020 industrials startup focused on developing next-generation satcom user terminals.
highlight.zh: 一家 YC 2020 冬季的工業類新創，專注於開發新一代的衛星通訊使用者終端設備。

summary.en: Duffl is a 10-minute delivery service for college students.
summary.zh: Duffl 是面向大學生的 10 分鐘送貨服務。

highlight.en: It uses data to wholesale high-demand, high-margin snacks and delivers them via electric scooters and a student workforce, launching at campuses like UCLA, USC, and UT Austin.
highlight.zh: 它運用資料批發高需求、高利潤的零食，並透過電動滑板車與學生人力配送，已於 UCLA、USC、UT Austin 等校園上線。

summary.en: Savvy offers flexible stipends for employees to buy their own health insurance.
summary.zh: Savvy 提供彈性津貼，讓員工自行購買健康保險。

highlight.en: Among the first to market after new HRA regulation, it scaled to tens of millions in volume across all 50 states before being acquired by incumbent Take Command in 2022.
highlight.zh: 它是新版 HRA 法規後最早進入市場者之一，業務量擴及全美 50 州並達數千萬美元規模，於 2022 年被既有業者 Take Command 收購。

summary.en: Skypher is an AI agent that automates compliance questionnaires.
summary.zh: Skypher 是一個自動化合規問卷的 AI 代理人。

highlight.en: Its AI agent makes security, privacy, DDQ, and ESG questionnaire responses 10x faster for 200+ customers like Deel, Retool, and Adobe, speeding sales cycles by 20%.
highlight.zh: 其 AI 代理人讓安全、隱私、DDQ 與 ESG 問卷的回覆速度快 10 倍，服務 Deel、Retool、Adobe 等逾 200 家客戶，並使銷售週期加快 20%。

summary.en: DeepSource is a unified DevSecOps platform that helps developers ship good code.
summary.zh: DeepSource 是一個統一的 DevSecOps 平台，協助開發者交付優質程式碼。

highlight.en: It automatically scans code and fixes it with Autofix AI to ship clean, secure software, and is trusted by 7,000+ teams from startups to Fortune 500s.
highlight.zh: 它自動掃描程式碼並以 Autofix AI 修復，交付乾淨且安全的軟體，獲從新創到財星 500 大逾 7,000 個團隊信賴。

summary.en: Thunderpod is a community engagement platform for workplaces and communities.
summary.zh: Thunderpod 是面向職場與社群的參與管理平台。

highlight.en: Its no-code Engagement Management System aims to be what SurveyMonkey is for surveys, but for member engagement.
highlight.zh: 其無程式碼的參與管理系統（EMS）志在成為成員參與領域的 SurveyMonkey。

summary.en: GuruHotel is building AI-native direct booking infrastructure for global hospitality.
summary.zh: GuruHotel 正在為全球飯店業打造 AI 原生的直接訂房基礎設施。

highlight.en: Positioned as Stripe for hotel bookings, its full-stack platform helps independent hotels sell directly and exposes inventory in machine-readable format so AI agents can book.
highlight.zh: 它定位為飯店訂房界的 Stripe，其全端平台協助獨立飯店直接銷售，並以機器可讀格式開放庫存，讓 AI 代理人也能完成訂房。

summary.en: Revenir is the first API solution for tax returns.
summary.zh: Revenir 是首個處理退稅的 API 解決方案。

highlight.en: It lets individuals and corporations claim back their value-added tax globally, with the trust of their own bank.
highlight.zh: 它讓個人與企業在全球範圍內申請退還加值稅（VAT），並以其本身銀行的信任為後盾。

summary.en: Chaos Genius is a DataOps observability platform for Snowflake.
summary.zh: Chaos Genius 是面向 Snowflake 的 DataOps 可觀測性平台。

highlight.en: It enables Snowflake observability to reduce costs and optimize query performance.
highlight.zh: 它提供 Snowflake 的可觀測性，協助降低成本並優化查詢效能。

summary.en: Letterdrop helps teams book more meetings using conversational intent.
summary.zh: Letterdrop 運用對話意圖訊號，協助團隊預約更多會議。

highlight.en: It surfaces warm leads from public and private conversations, calls, and CRM, then drafts personalized outbound for hot leads and nurtures others with automated thought leadership.
highlight.zh: 它從公開與私下對話、通話及 CRM 中找出熱度高的潛在客戶，為熱門名單草擬個人化開發訊息，並以自動化的專業內容培養其他名單。

summary.en: goDutch is a group payments product that lets people pay together offline.
summary.zh: goDutch 是一款讓人們在線下共同付款的群組支付產品。

highlight.en: Built for millennials, it reimagines the tedious multi-step process of one person paying for a group and then chasing everyone to pay them back.
highlight.zh: 它為千禧世代打造，重新構想由一人代付、再向眾人追討款項這種繁瑣的多步驟流程。

summary.en: SprintAI is an AI-led platform for inventory and fulfillment optimization.
summary.zh: SprintAI 是一個以 AI 為主導的庫存與履約優化平台。

highlight.en: It helps brands and retailers make better decisions and automate processes across inventory management and omnichannel fulfillment.
highlight.zh: 它協助品牌與零售商在庫存管理與全通路履約上做出更佳決策並自動化流程。

summary.en: Atmo provides ultra-precise AI weather forecasting.
summary.zh: Atmo 提供超精準的 AI 天氣預報。

highlight.en: Its AI forecasts are up to 50% more accurate, 10x more detailed, and run 40,000x faster, trusted by users like the US Department of Defense, the Philippines, and the UN.
highlight.zh: 其 AI 預報準確度最高提升 50%、細節提升 10 倍、運算速度快 4 萬倍，獲美國國防部、菲律賓與聯合國等使用者信賴。

summary.en: Dashworks is your team's intelligent start page.
summary.zh: Dashworks 是團隊的智慧起始頁。

highlight.en: It brings together documents, messages, tickets, and knowledge scattered across a company's apps and people so teams can get on the same page and get things done.
highlight.zh: 它將散落在公司各應用程式與成員間的文件、訊息、工單與知識整合在一起，讓團隊達成共識並完成工作。

summary.en: Weav is the universal API for commerce platforms.
summary.zh: Weav 是面向商務平台的通用 API。

highlight.en: It builds the digital infrastructure to connect small businesses with financial institutions through a single commerce-platform API.
highlight.zh: 它打造數位基礎設施，透過單一商務平台 API 將小型企業與金融機構連結起來。

summary.en: Multiverse is a web-based game creation system inspired by Dungeons & Dragons and Roblox.
summary.zh: Multiverse 是一個受《龍與地下城》與 Roblox 啟發的網頁版遊戲創作系統。

highlight.en: It pairs game creation with a marketplace for assets from A-list creators, charging 30-60% of sales based on how much it helps creators make the content.
highlight.zh: 它將遊戲創作與一流創作者的素材市集結合，依協助創作內容的程度收取銷售額的 30-60%。

summary.en: onetool is an app store for SaaS, offering one invoice, one user management, and one login.
summary.zh: onetool 是 SaaS 的應用程式商店，提供單一發票、單一使用者管理與單一登入。

highlight.en: It gives businesses their own app store for software, with centralized user management spanning project management, video conferencing, and document signing.
highlight.zh: 它為企業提供專屬的軟體應用程式商店，並集中管理使用者，涵蓋專案管理、視訊會議到文件簽署等工具。

summary.en: yBANQ is building a Bill.com for India to simplify collections.
summary.zh: yBANQ 正在打造印度版的 Bill.com，以簡化收款流程。

highlight.en: It builds a collections and reconciliation platform for India's MSMEs, replacing the largely manual, error-prone matching of bank statements with invoices.
highlight.zh: 它為印度的微中小企業打造收款與對帳平台，取代大量仰賴人工、易出錯的銀行對帳單與發票比對作業。

summary.en: Oda is an AI agent for home design.
summary.zh: Oda 是一個用於居家設計的 AI 代理人。

highlight.en: It helps homebuyers and renters discover interior preferences and find furniture aggregated from many retailers, distributing through AI iFrames on real estate partner websites.
highlight.zh: 它協助購屋者與租屋者發掘室內設計偏好，並彙整多家零售商的家具供其挑選，並透過嵌入房地產夥伴網站的 AI iFrame 推廣。

summary.en: Sakneen is a Shopify for real estate developers.
summary.zh: Sakneen 是房地產開發商的 Shopify。

highlight.en: A YC Winter 2020 MENA proptech startup giving real estate developers e-commerce-style tools to sell their properties online.
highlight.zh: 一家 YC 2020 冬季的中東北非房地產科技新創，為地產開發商提供電商式工具以在線上銷售物件。

summary.en: SEND is a Flexport for Africa, a digital freight forwarder and customs broker.
summary.zh: SEND 是非洲版的 Flexport，是一家數位貨運承攬商與報關行。

highlight.en: It manages the entire process of shipping cargo by air or sea, including documentation, customs, warehouse delivery, and trade financing.
highlight.zh: 它管理空運或海運貨物的整個流程，包含文件處理、報關、配送至倉庫與貿易融資。

summary.en: Phonic is a tool to collect and analyze voice and video feedback.
summary.zh: Phonic 是一個蒐集並分析語音與影像回饋的工具。

highlight.en: It offers a streamlined way for teams to gather and analyze voice and video responses, going beyond text-based feedback.
highlight.zh: 它讓團隊以更順暢的方式蒐集並分析語音與影像回應，超越純文字回饋的限制。

summary.en: Alude offers free software that automates bureaucracy for real estate professionals.
summary.zh: Alude 提供免費軟體，為房地產從業人員自動化繁瑣的行政手續。

highlight.en: A YC Winter 2020 LatAm proptech startup using free software to cut the paperwork and bureaucracy involved in real estate transactions.
highlight.zh: 一家 YC 2020 冬季的拉丁美洲房地產科技新創，以免費軟體削減房地產交易中的文書與行政手續。

summary.en: Signadot provides scalable validation infrastructure for AI agents.
summary.zh: Signadot 為 AI 代理人提供可擴展的驗證基礎設施。

highlight.en: Its Kubernetes-native platform combines fast ephemeral environments with a validation framework so AI coding agents can verify code and safely merge pull requests at scale.
highlight.zh: 其 Kubernetes 原生平台結合快速的臨時環境與驗證框架，讓 AI 寫程式代理人能大規模驗證程式碼並安全合併 pull request。

summary.en: Dropbase is an AI app builder for internal back-office tools.
summary.zh: Dropbase 是一個用於內部後台工具的 AI 應用程式建構工具。

highlight.en: Its prompt-based interface lets developers build backend panels and dashboards that fetch data and trigger actions across any database or service, for support-intensive industries.
highlight.zh: 其基於提示詞的介面讓開發者建立後台面板與儀表板，可跨任何資料庫或服務擷取資料並觸發動作，適用於支援密集的產業。

summary.en: Easyplan is an AI-driven investment app for beginner investors in India.
summary.zh: Easyplan 是面向印度初階投資人的 AI 驅動投資應用程式。

highlight.en: A cross between Betterment and Qapital, it offers money market funds and an investment-secured credit card, simplifying investing for India's beginner-focused market.
highlight.zh: 它融合 Betterment 與 Qapital 的特色，提供貨幣市場基金與以投資擔保的信用卡，為印度初階投資市場簡化投資流程。

summary.en: Angle Health provides health insurance for startups.
summary.zh: Angle Health 為新創公司提供健康保險。

highlight.en: A YC Winter 2020 startup delivering health insurance tailored to the needs of startups.
highlight.zh: 一家 YC 2020 冬季的新創，提供專為新創公司需求量身打造的健康保險。

summary.en: Jet Admin is a no-code business app builder.
summary.zh: Jet Admin 是一個無程式碼的企業應用程式建構工具。

highlight.en: It assembles multi-page internal tools, admin panels, and portals via drag-and-drop, with developer tools for custom SQL, HTTP queries, JavaScript, and embedded UI components.
highlight.zh: 它以拖放方式組建多頁的內部工具、管理面板與入口網站，並提供自訂 SQL、HTTP 查詢、JavaScript 與嵌入式 UI 元件等開發者工具。

summary.en: Flowglad helps teams turn client context into revenue.
summary.zh: Flowglad 協助團隊將客戶情境資料轉化為營收。

highlight.en: It provides a single place for the qualitative and quantitative data in a company's systems, plus the tribal knowledge trapped in team members' heads.
highlight.zh: 它為公司系統中的質化與量化資料，以及困在團隊成員腦中的隱性知識，提供一個集中之處。

summary.en: Polytomic enables no-code data syncing between your systems.
summary.zh: Polytomic 讓你的各系統之間無需寫程式即可同步資料。

highlight.en: Its no-code web app syncs data between internal databases, business systems like Stripe and Salesforce, data warehouses, spreadsheets, and even HTTP APIs.
highlight.zh: 其無程式碼網頁應用可在內部資料庫、Stripe 與 Salesforce 等業務系統、資料倉儲、試算表，甚至 HTTP API 之間同步資料。

summary.en: Paneau puts tablets inside Uber/Lyft rides to advertise directly to riders.
summary.zh: Paneau 在 Uber/Lyft 車內放置平板，直接向乘客投放廣告。

highlight.en: Riders can interact with the in-car tablets to do anything from make purchases to re-route the car, creating an engagement channel for advertisers.
highlight.zh: 乘客可與車內平板互動，從購物到重新規劃路線皆可，為廣告主創造一個互動管道。

summary.en: yearend lets startup employees optimize their equity and taxes in real-time.
summary.zh: yearend 讓新創員工即時優化自己的股權與稅務。

highlight.en: Employees connect their financial accounts, and YearEnd shows how much tax they'll owe, makes recommendations, and can file their tax return or collaborate with their accountant.
highlight.zh: 員工連結金融帳戶後，YearEnd 會顯示應繳稅額、提供建議，並可代為申報或與其既有的稅務會計師協作。

summary.en: Jitter is a fast and simple motion design tool on the web.
summary.zh: Jitter 是一個快速又簡單的網頁版動態設計工具。

highlight.en: Billed as Figma for motion design, it helps designers create professional animations for content, videos, websites, or apps while collaborating with product and marketing teams.
highlight.zh: 它被稱為動態設計界的 Figma，協助設計師為內容、影片、網站或 App 製作專業動畫，並與產品及行銷團隊協作。

summary.en: Zumo Labs generates synthetic data for computer vision models.
summary.zh: Zumo Labs 為電腦視覺模型產生合成資料。

highlight.en: It creates feature-rich synthetic training data in the cloud that is cheaper, faster, covers all edge cases, and avoids the bias and privacy issues of manually collected data.
highlight.zh: 它在雲端產生功能豐富的合成訓練資料，更便宜、更快、涵蓋所有邊緣案例，並避免人工蒐集資料的偏見與隱私問題。

summary.en: Daedalus is an AWS for precision manufacturing.
summary.zh: Daedalus 是精密製造業的 AWS。

highlight.en: A YC Winter 2020 industrials startup applying a cloud-infrastructure model to on-demand precision manufacturing.
highlight.zh: 一家 YC 2020 冬季的工業類新創，將雲端基礎設施模式應用於隨需的精密製造。

summary.en: Zynq is an office management platform that optimizes your hybrid workplace.
summary.zh: Zynq 是一個優化混合辦公的辦公室管理平台。

highlight.en: Its all-in-one workspace management platform helps companies embrace the hybrid office, giving employees a quick way to find the best time and space to collaborate and meet guests.
highlight.zh: 其一站式工作空間管理平台協助公司擁抱混合辦公，讓員工快速找到最佳的協作與會客時間與空間。

summary.en: Tasker AI is your AI co-worker for everyday work and life to-dos.
summary.zh: Tasker AI 是處理日常工作與生活待辦事項的 AI 同事。

highlight.en: It is an AI assistant able to perform complex tasks from a single prompt by using multiple tools.
highlight.zh: 它是一個 AI 助理，能透過運用多種工具，從單一提示詞執行複雜的任務。

summary.en: Legionfarm is an AI workspace and marketplace for professional gamers.
summary.zh: Legionfarm 是面向職業玩家的 AI 工作空間與媒合平台。

highlight.en: Its AI-powered marketplace lets gamers hire top-1% pros for coaching and carry in AAA games; it has served 250k+ customers and used LLM automation to replace 100+ ops roles.
highlight.zh: 其 AI 媒合平台讓玩家在 3A 遊戲中聘請前 1% 的高手進行指導與代打，已服務逾 25 萬名客戶，並以 LLM 自動化取代逾 100 個營運職位。

summary.en: Finlens is an AI accounting co-pilot for founders and accountants.
summary.zh: Finlens 是面向創辦人與會計師的 AI 會計副駕駛。

highlight.en: Built on top of existing QuickBooks setups with no migration, it automates categorization, GAAP schedules, and collaboration for faster closes and real-time visibility.
highlight.zh: 它建構於既有的 QuickBooks 之上、無需轉移資料，自動化分類、GAAP 排程與協作，達成更快的結帳與即時的財務可見度。

summary.en: Breezeful is an online mortgage broker that helps you get the best mortgage, fast.
summary.zh: Breezeful 是一家線上房貸經紀商，協助你快速取得最佳房貸方案。

highlight.en: Instead of dealing with multiple banks and in-person meetings, it uses your financial data to negotiate with hundreds of lenders on your behalf in seconds.
highlight.zh: 它不需你周旋於多家銀行與面對面會議，而是運用你的財務資料，在數秒內代你向數百家貸方議價。
